sn11.25:1.1:
1
Thus have I heard. On one occasion the Blessed One was dwelling at Sāvatthī in Jeta's Grove, Anāthapiṇḍika's Park. There the Blessed One said this:
sn11.25:1.2: "Bhikkhus, once in the past Sakka, lord of the devas, instructing the Tāvatiṁsa devas in the Sudhamma assembly hall, on that occasion recited this verse:
sn11.25:2.2:
2
"‘Do not let anger overpower you;
Do not become angry at those who are angry.
Nonanger and harmlessness always dwell
Within
the noble ones.
Like a mountain avalanche
Anger crushes evil people.’"
sn11.25:4.2: The Book with Verses is finished.
